Photo Booth Rental in Quispamsis NB

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 360 Photo Booth rentals for events in Quispamsis NB. Perfect for birthdays, corporate events, fundraisers, graduations, and community celebrations. Rent standalone or as an add-on with an inflatable or package rental. Setup, takedown, and operator included. Available for selected events in New Brunswick — contact us to confirm availability and travel cost.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. New Brunswick bookings are available for selected events by quote. Travel cost confirmed before booking.

Featured Rentals

  • 360 Photo Booth - Photo Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Photo Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Birthdays and milestone celebrations
  • Corporate and fundraising events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer 360 Photo Booth rentals in Quispamsis?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals offers 360 Photo Booth rentals in Quispamsis NB for selected events. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost for your event date.
How much does the 360 Photo Booth cost?
Standalone: $249 for 1 hour, additional hours $125/hr. Add-on with any inflatable or package: $199 for 1 hour, additional hours $70/hr. Operator included.
What does the photo booth rental include?
Setup and takedown are included. Operator is included. Basic props may be included when available.
Is booking confirmed after I submit the form?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Availability, travel cost, and pricing are confirmed manually before your rental is finalized.
